{"society_power": 3.5, "state_power": 8.0, "society_change": -0.5, "state_change": 0.0, "key_event": "Green Movement crushed; Bloody November lethal repression", "reasoning": "The state retained overwhelming coercive capacity\u2014crushing the Green Movement aftermath and killing hundreds in the 2019 fuel protests with internet blackouts\u2014even as sanctions eroded distributive/fiscal reach, so state power holds around 8 with coercion offsetting fiscal squeeze. Society showed recurrent but leaderless, easily suppressed mobilization; digital connectivity and youth grievances raised latent capacity but organized reformist channels were crushed, netting a slight decline."}
